Uses of Interface
com.societegenerale.failover.core.clock.FailoverClock

Packages that use FailoverClock
Package
Description
com.societegenerale.failover.configuration
Spring Boot auto-configuration for the failover framework.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.clock
Clock abstraction for failover expiry calculations.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable
Observable SPI and core implementations for the failover lifecycle.
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher
Observable publisher SPI and built-in implementations.
com.societegenerale.failover.store.caffeine
Caffeine-backed in-process FailoverStore.

  • Uses of FailoverClock in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration

    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration that return FailoverClock
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FailoverClock
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverClock()
    Creates the default failover clock bean.
    Methods in com.societegenerale.failover.configuration with parameters of type FailoverClock
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    TenantStoreFactory<Object>
    FailoverStoreMultiTenantAutoConfiguration.caffeineMultiTenantStoreFactory(FailoverClock failoverClock, FailoverProperties properties)
    Registers a per-tenant Caffeine store factory (one isolated cache per tenant).
    CompositeObservablePublisher
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.compositeObservablePublisher(List<ObservablePublisher> observablePublishers, FailoverClock clock)
    Registers a composite publisher that stamps the publish timestamp once and broadcasts to every ObservablePublisher in the context.
    ExpiryPolicy<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.defaultExpiryPolicy(FailoverClock clock, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor)
    Creates the default expiry policy bean.
    FailoverHandler<Object>
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverHandler(KeyGenerator keyGenerator, ExpiryPolicy<Object> expiryPolicy, FailoverClock clock, FailoverStore<Object> failoverStore, PayloadEnricher<Object> payloadEnricher, RecoveredPayloadHandler recoveredPayloadHandler, org.springframework.context.ApplicationContext applicationContext, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, PayloadSplitterLookup<Object,Object> payloadSplitterLookup, ContextPropagator contextPropagator, org.springframework.beans.factory.ObjectProvider<org.springframework.core.task.TaskExecutor> scatterGatherExecutorProvider, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Assembles the full FailoverHandler decorator chain: AdvancedFailoverHandler(ScatterGatherFailoverHandler(DefaultFailoverHandler)).
    FailoverObserver
    FailoverAutoConfiguration.failoverObserver(CompositeObservablePublisher observablePublisher, FailoverScanner failoverScanner, FailoverClock clock, ManifestInfoExtractor manifestInfoExtractor, FailoverExpiryExtractor failoverExpiryExtractor, FailoverProperties failoverProperties)
    Creates the failover reporter bean that publishes a startup summary.

    Class

    class 
    DefaultFailoverClock
    Default FailoverClock that returns the current UTC instant from the system clock.

  • Uses of FailoverClock in com.societegenerale.failover.store.caffeine

    Constructors in com.societegenerale.failover.store.caffeine with parameters of type FailoverClock
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    FailoverStoreCaffeine(FailoverClock fClock)
    Constructs an unbounded FailoverStoreCaffeine (size limited only by per-entry expiry).
     
    FailoverStoreCaffeine(FailoverClock fClock, long maximumSize)
    Constructs a FailoverStoreCaffeine with an optional maximum entry count.
